_comment: Copy this to termina.config.json (next to server.js) to define your own terminal types. Each becomes an option in every window's dropdown. Commands run on your machine as you; cwd supports ~ for your home directory. Every profile auto-trusts 'do you trust this folder?' style CLI prompts by default — add "autoTrust": false to a profile to opt it out.
_usage_comment: Optional spending limits (USD). sessionLimitUsd covers the current app run's live sessions; dailyLimitUsd covers today's total (persisted in .termina/usage-history.jsonl). At 80% of a limit every client shows a warning; at/over the daily limit NEW session starts return 409 until you raise the limit here — running sessions are never killed. Omit the key (or either field) for no limit.

profiles.label: My Project (dev)
profiles.note: Starts the dev server in my project.
